evidence_summary: The sequence must depict a high-stakes tactical infiltration of Zodanga following a ten-day march. The focus is on the physical mechanics of scaling carborundum walls using human ladders and leather straps, transitioning from the tension of arrival to the f...

After a ten-day march, the Thark army reaches Zodanga. John Carter leads a stealthy infiltration, scaling the carborundum walls using human ladders and leather straps to enter the palace grounds and prepare the gates for the main attack.
Vertical tracking shots of wall scaling
POV shots from Carter's perspective looking into the city
